plugins.name: Music
plugins.tagline: NYX's own local music manager & player
plugins.description: Upload and organize a local music library, build queues and playlists, save SoundCloud links for one-click replay, auto-import from watch folders, and control everything by voice. Adds The Forge → Music to your sidebar.
plugins.author: SageTech
features: Local library with drag & drop upload (MP3, WAV, FLAC, M4A, OGG)
SoundCloud links — save once, replay forever
Voice & chat control ("play after dark", "pause the music")
